stories.headline: What we know on day three of US-Israeli attacks on Iran
stories.description: A day after Iranian supreme leader’s killing was confirmed, attacks are reported in Dubai, Cyprus and across the region.

stories.headline: British military base in Cyprus targeted in suspected drone attack
stories.description: The attack marks the first strike on a British military base in Cyprus since 1986, escalating regional tensions.

stories.headline: After Iran’s salvo hit their skylines, will Gulf states enter the war?
stories.description: Gulf states face an impossible choice after Iranian attacks: remain passive, or risk being seen as fighting with Israel.

stories.headline: Iran-backed militias join war, US Embassy in Kuwait is hit
stories.description: Iran escalates war; Kuwait embassy hit and Saudi oil refinery shuts down after drone attack.

stories.headline: Balen Shah: Rapper, mayor, Nepal’s next prime minister?
stories.description: His sunglasses and songs are the rage, but the ex-Kathmandu mayor has his sights on Nepal’s top job.
